import pytest
import sys

@pytest.mark.skip(reason="Feature JIRA-1234 not yet implemented")
def test_feature_not_ready():
    pass

@pytest.mark.skipif(
    sys.platform == "win32",
    reason="File permissions model differs on Windows",
)
def test_linux_only():
    pass

@pytest.mark.skip(reason="Blocked by upstream API change in ticket JIRA-5678")
def test_waiting_for_api():
    pass

def test_normal():
    assert True

@pytest.mark.skipif(
    sys.version_info < (3, 12),
    reason="Requires PEP 701 type parameter syntax",
)
def test_requires_312():
    pass
